nodes.description: UE is in 5GMM-DEREGISTERED state, not registered with the network.
UE has sent a REGISTRATION REQUEST and is waiting for a response (timer T3510 running).
UE is processing authentication or security mode command messages.
UE has received REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is preparing/sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
UE is successfully registered with the network (5GMM-REGISTERED state).
UE received REGISTRATION REJECT with cause #22 (Congestion) and is waiting for T3346 timer to expire.
UE received REGISTRATION REJECT with a cause requiring PLMN/SNPN selection and is performing the selection process.
UE experienced T3510 timeout (retries < 5) and is waiting for T3511 timer to expire before retrying registration.
UE experienced T3510 timeout (max retries reached) and is waiting for T3502 timer to expire before potentially performing PLMN selection.
AMF is idle with respect to this UE's registration procedure.
AMF has received REGISTRATION REQUEST and is processing it, potentially initiating common procedures.
AMF is performing authentication and/or security procedures with the UE.
AMF has sent REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and is waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE (timer T3550 running).
AMF considers the UE successfully registered (5GMM-REGISTERED state).
REGISTRATION REQUEST message is sent by UE or received by AMF.
AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message is sent by AMF or received by UE.
SECURITY MODE COMMAND message is sent by AMF or received by UE.
AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.
SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.
REGISTRATION ACCEPT message requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment is sent by AMF or received by UE.
REGISTRATION ACCEPT message not requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment is sent by AMF or received by UE.
REGISTRATION REJECT message is sent by AMF or received by UE.
REGISTRATION COMPLETE message is sent by UE or received by AMF.
Timer T3510 expires at UE, and registration attempt counter is less than 5.
Timer T3510 expires at UE, and registration attempt counter is equal to 5.
Timer T3511 expires at UE.
Timer T3502 expires at UE (or its value was zero).
Timer T3346 expires at UE.
UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process.
Timer T3550 expires at AMF (1st to 4th time).
Timer T3550 expires at AMF for the 5th time.
An abnormal case occurs at the UE (e.g., lower layer failure, access barring, transmission failure).
UE detects TAI change after REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure, and new TAI is not in the list.
An abnormal case occurs at the AMF (e.g., lower layer failure).

edges.description: Triggered when the UE in state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED initiates the initial registration procedure by sending a REGISTRATION REQUEST message (e.g., for 5GS services, emergency, SMS, mobility from GERAN/UTRAN, onboarding, disaster roaming, resuming service).
UE transitions to attempting registration after sending the REGISTRATION REQUEST and starting timer T3510. Timers T3502 and T3511 are stopped if running.
Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION REQUEST message from the UE.
AMF transitions to processing the request upon receiving the REGISTRATION REQUEST message.
AMF initiates 5GMM common procedures (e.g., authentication, security) based on information in the REGISTRATION REQUEST.
edges.condition: Condition: Triggered if authentication/security procedures are needed (e.g., no valid 5G NAS security context, network policy).

edges.description: Triggered when the AMF sends an AUTHENTICATION REQUEST message to the UE as part of the authentication procedure.
edges.condition: Condition: Authentication procedure is initiated by the AMF.

edges.description: UE transitions to authenticating/securing state upon receiving the AUTHENTICATION REQUEST from the AMF.
Triggered when the AMF sends a SECURITY MODE COMMAND message to the UE to activate NAS security.
edges.condition: Condition: Security mode control procedure is initiated by the AMF (e.g., after successful authentication or if needed based on context).

edges.description: UE transitions to authenticating/securing state upon receiving the SECURITY MODE COMMAND from the AMF.
Triggered when the UE sends an AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE message to the AMF.
edges.condition: Condition: UE has processed the AUTHENTICATION REQUEST.

edges.description: UE returns to waiting state (attempting registration) after sending the AUTHENTICATION RESPONSE.
Triggered when the UE sends a SECURITY MODE COMPLETE message to the AMF.
edges.condition: Condition: UE has successfully processed the SECURITY MODE COMMAND and applied security.

edges.description: UE returns to waiting state (attempting registration) after sending the SECURITY MODE COMPLETE.
Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment from the UE.
edges.condition: Condition: Registration accepted AND specific IEs (e.g., 5G-GUTI reallocation, SOR container, Operator-defined AC definitions, CAG info, RACS ID, certain slicing info (Configured NSSAI, NSSRG, Alternative NSSAI, S-NSSAI time/location validity, On-demand NSSAI, Subscription change), PEIPS info if RCMAP set, UUAA pending, Truncated 5G-S-TMSI config) are included, requiring acknowledgment (see 5.5.1.2.4).

edges.description: AMF transitions to waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (requiring complete) and starts timer T3550.
Triggered when the AMF accepts the registration and sends a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does *not* require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment.
edges.condition: Condition: Registration accepted AND none of the conditions requiring REGISTRATION COMPLETE (see Edge 14 condition) are met.

edges.description: AMF transitions directly to registered state after sending REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring complete).
Triggered when the AMF rejects the registration request and sends a REGISTRATION REJECT message.
edges.condition: Condition: Registration request cannot be accepted (due to various reasons like congestion, not allowed, invalid ME/UE, slicing issues, CAG restrictions etc. - see 5.5.1.2.5).

edges.description: AMF returns to idle state regarding this UE's registration attempt after sending the REGISTRATION REJECT message.
Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that requires a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment.
edges.condition: Condition: Network accepted registration AND sent specific IEs requiring acknowledgment (see Edge 14 condition).

edges.description: UE resets registration attempt counter, stores received information, and transitions to state for sending REGISTRATION COMPLETE upon receiving an ACCEPT message requiring acknowledgment.
Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION ACCEPT message that does *not* require a REGISTRATION COMPLETE acknowledgment.
edges.condition: Condition: Network accepted registration AND did not send IEs requiring acknowledgment.

edges.description: UE resets registration attempt counter, stores received information, and transitions directly to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) upon receiving REGISTRATION ACCEPT (not requiring complete).
Triggered when the UE receives a REGISTRATION REJECT message from the AMF.
edges.condition: Condition: Network rejected the registration request.

edges.description: UE aborts registration, sets 5GS update status to NOT UPDATED, resets counter, starts timer T3346, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION.
edges.condition: Condition: REGISTRATION REJECT received with 5GMM cause #22 (Congestion) and a valid T3346 value.

edges.description: UE sets 5GS update status to ROAMING NOT ALLOWED, deletes context (e.g., GUTI, TAI list), resets counter, stores forbidden PLMN/SNPN/TAI as applicable, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.PLMN-SEARCH to perform PLMN/SNPN selection.
edges.condition: Condition: REGISTRATION REJECT received with specific causes requiring PLMN/SNPN selection (e.g., #11, #13, #73, #74, #75, #76 (some cases), #78, #80).

edges.description: UE handles rejection based on the specific cause, potentially setting update status, deleting context, disabling N1 mode, storing forbidden info, resetting counter, and entering a deregistered state (e.g., NO-SUPI, LIMITED-SERVICE, ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION).
edges.condition: Condition: REGISTRATION REJECT received with causes leading to deregistration without immediate PLMN search or T3346 backoff (e.g., #3, #6, #7, #10, #12, #15, #27, #31, #36, #62 (some cases), #72, #77, #79, #81, #82, or other abnormal causes).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3346 expires.
edges.condition: Condition: Timer T3346 expires.

edges.description: UE transitions back to deregistered state upon T3346 expiry, allowing potential re-attempt of registration if still needed.
Triggered when the UE completes the PLMN/SNPN selection process according to 3GPP TS 23.122.
edges.condition: Condition: A suitable PLMN/SNPN is found, or it's determined none is available.

edges.description: UE transitions to deregistered state (potentially on a newly selected PLMN/SNPN or remaining in limited service) after completing PLMN/SNPN selection, ready to initiate registration if a suitable cell is found.
Triggered when the UE sends the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message to the AMF.
edges.condition: Condition: UE received REGISTRATION ACCEPT requiring acknowledgment and has prepared the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message.

edges.description: UE transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) after successfully sending the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message.
Triggered when the AMF receives the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message from the UE.
edges.condition: Condition: UE sent REGISTRATION COMPLETE.

edges.description: AMF stops timer T3550 and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) upon receiving the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message.
Triggered when timer T3510 expires at the UE.
edges.condition: Condition: T3510 expires AND registration attempt counter < 5 (Abnormal case 5.5.1.2.7 c).

edges.description: UE aborts registration, increments attempt counter, starts timer T3511, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION.
edges.condition: Condition: T3510 expired and attempt counter < 5.

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3511 expires.
edges.condition: Condition: Timer T3511 expires.

edges.description: UE transitions back to deregistered state upon T3511 expiry to re-attempt registration if still required.
Triggered when timer T3510 expires at the UE.
edges.condition: Condition: T3510 expires AND registration attempt counter = 5 (Abnormal case 5.5.1.2.7 c).

edges.description: UE aborts registration, sets attempt counter to 5, deletes TAI list/GUTI etc., starts timer T3502 (if > 0), sets update status to NOT UPDATED, and enters state 5GMM-DEREGISTERED.ATTEMPTING-REGISTRATION (or PLMN-SEARCH).
edges.condition: Condition: T3510 expired and attempt counter = 5.

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3502 expires (or if its value was initially zero).
edges.condition: Condition: Timer T3502 expires or its value is zero.

edges.description: UE performs actions defined for T3502 expiry (potentially PLMN selection) and remains in a deregistered state.
Triggered by various UE-internal or lower-layer failures during the registration attempt.
edges.condition: Condition: Occurrence of specific abnormal cases listed in 5.5.1.2.7 (e.g., lower layer failure (e), access barring (b, ba), UE initiated de-registration (f), TAI change (h), transmission failure of request (k), access for localized services no longer allowed (n)).

edges.description: UE aborts the registration procedure and transitions to a deregistered state (potentially LIMITED-SERVICE or PLMN-SEARCH) following a UE-internal or lower-layer failure.
edges.condition: Condition: Failure event occurred (see Edge 44) and the specific abnormal case leads to deregistration (e.g., cases b, ba, e, f, k, n in 5.5.1.2.7).

edges.description: Triggered by transmission failure of the REGISTRATION COMPLETE message indicated by lower layers.
edges.condition: Condition: Lower layer indicates failure to transmit REGISTRATION COMPLETE (Abnormal cases 5.5.1.2.7 i, j).

edges.description: UE attempts to resend REGISTRATION COMPLETE after a transmission failure.
edges.condition: Condition: Transmission failure occurred AND current TAI is still in the TAI list (case i.1) OR UE implementation decides to retry (case j).

edges.description: UE detects TAI has changed and is no longer in the assigned TAI list following a REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure.
edges.condition: Condition: Transmission failure occurred AND current TAI is not in the TAI list received in REGISTRATION ACCEPT (Abnormal case 5.5.1.2.7 i.2).

edges.description: UE aborts initial registration procedure and initiates mobility registration update due to TAI change after REGISTRATION COMPLETE transmission failure.
edges.condition: Condition: TAI change detected after transmission failure (see Edge 48).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3550 expires at the AMF (1st to 4th time).
edges.condition: Condition: T3550 expires AND retransmission counter < 4 (Abnormal case 5.5.1.2.8 c).

edges.description: AMF retransmits REGISTRATION ACCEPT message, resets and restarts timer T3550, and returns to waiting state.
edges.condition: Condition: T3550 expired (1st-4th time).

edges.description: Triggered when timer T3550 expires for the 5th time at the AMF.
edges.condition: Condition: T3550 expires AND retransmission counter = 4 (Abnormal case 5.5.1.2.8 c).

edges.description: AMF aborts the registration procedure and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) after T3550 max timeouts.
edges.condition: Condition: T3550 expired for the 5th time.

edges.description: Triggered by a lower layer failure at the AMF while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
edges.condition: Condition: Lower layer failure occurs before REGISTRATION COMPLETE is received and T3550 is running (Abnormal case 5.5.1.2.8 a).

edges.description: AMF locally aborts the registration procedure and transitions to registered state (5GMM-REGISTERED) following a lower layer failure.
edges.condition: Condition: Lower layer failure occurred while waiting for REGISTRATION COMPLETE.
